title: J.A.R.V.I.S. - The Ultimate AI Assistant
description: A sleek, Jarvis-themed assistant for Minecraft. Retrieve items, toggle flight, and control the weather using natural English commands and immersive sound effects.
body:
# 🤖 J.A.R.V.I.S. - Your Personal Intelligent Assistant

**J.A.R.V.I.S.** (*Just A Rather Very Intelligent System*) is a powerful, lightweight utility plugin that brings an interactive AI assistant experience to your Minecraft server. Instead of typing rigid, boring commands, you can talk to J.A.R.V.I.S. in natural English sentences.

---

## 🌟 Key Features

* **🧠 Smart Recognition:** Automatically detects items within your sentences. No more looking up exact IDs!
* **🔊 Immersive Sounds:** Features high-tech sound effects for processing and completing requests.
* **⚡ Zero Lag:** Designed with performance in mind, ensuring no impact on server TPS.
* **🎮 Intuitive Control:** Manage your inventory, world, and abilities through simple conversation.

---

## 📜 Commands & Examples

You can use either `/jarvis` or the shortcut `/jr`.

### 📦 Item Retrieval
J.A.R.V.I.S. scans your request for any Minecraft item and delivers a stack (64) to your inventory.
* **Command:** `/jr give me [item_name]`
* **Examples:**
  * `/jr I need a diamond sword`
  * `/jr bring me golden_apple`
  * `/jr give me some stone`

### 🕊️ Flight Protocols
Quickly toggle your ability to fly.
* **Command:** `/jr fly` or `/jr flight`
* **Examples:**
  * `/jr enable flight`
  * `/jr I want to fly`

### ☀️ Environment Control
Control the time of day and the weather with ease.
* **Time Commands:**
  * `/jr set it to day` (Morning)
  * `/jr make it night` (Evening)
* **Weather Commands:**
  * `/jr clear the sky` (Sun)
  * `/jr stop the rain`

---

## 🛠️ Installation

1. **Download** the `.jar` file.
2. **Place** it into your server's `plugins` folder.
3. **Restart** your server.
4. **Start** chatting with J.A.R.V.I.S.!

> **Note:** This plugin requires no configuration or API keys. It works out of the box for all users!
